item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

When Trump widened trade with a fight,
Nations saw tariffs take flight.
China raced to the docks,
While Europe took stock,
In a world where costs rose overnight.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Staggering U.S. Tariffs Begin as Trump Widens Trade War
  • Trump’s Higher Tariffs Are Here. Now What?
  • China’s Exports Surged in July as Companies Raced to Beat Trump Tariffs

item.title: UNESCO's Exit and Cyber Ballet
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

UNESCO’s Exit and Cyber Ballet

Trump said UNESCO, I’ll leave,
As China’s influence weaves.
While hackers play,
In a cyber ballet,
Through software with tricks up their sleeve.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • As Trump Quits UNESCO, China Expands Influence
  • What to Know About the U.S. Move to Withdraw From UNESCO
  • Chinese Hackers Are Exploiting Flaws in Widely Used Software, Microsoft Says

item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

Trump’s tariffs sent markets awry,
With stock traders left wondering why.
Yet with bluffs now in past,
His stance holds steadfast,
While Europe and China both sigh.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • It’s No Bluff: The Tariff Rate Is Soaring Under Trump
  • Stocks Wobble on Trump’s Latest Tariff Threats
  • How Long Can China Keep Propping Up Its Consumers With Subsidies?

item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

Trump’s tariffs stirred quite the fray,
With Europe, their wallets to pay.
But Vietnam’s in a bind,
With China entwined,
As trade deals keep slipping away.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Pivoting From Tax Cuts to Tariffs, Trump Ignores Economic Warning Signs
  • How China Stands in the Way of a U.S.-Vietnam Trade Deal
  • Trump’s E.U. Tariff Threat Could Cause Economic Damage Beyond Europe

item.title: Trump's Global Game
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Global Game

In Qatar, Trump’s visit was grand,
Once foes, now a shake of the hand.
Infantino’s in tow,
For the World Cup show,
While China’s tariffs still stand.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • With Trump Visit, Qatar’s Image Makeover Scores Another Success
  • Infantino, FIFA President, Joins Trump on His Middle East Tour
  • Beyond Tariff Truce, China Readies for a Rocky Time With U.S.

item.title: Tariffs and Tactics
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariffs and Tactics

For tariffs, Trump’s plan is a feat,
As inflation threats start to repeat.
Jerome Powell’s calm stance,
Gives markets a chance,
While China and Trump both compete.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Inflation Mild Ahead of Expected Jump From Tariffs
  • Jerome Powell, a Potential Winner from the Trade Reprieve
  • Tariff Flip-Flops
  • There Are Two Chinas, and America Must Understand Both

item.title: Trade Winds and Diplomatic Grins
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trade Winds and Diplomatic Grins

In a trade war quite bold and grand,
Trump and Xi shook each other’s hand.
Tariffs were slashed,
Stocks rose and cash splashed,
As Lula courted China’s demand.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. and China Reach Deal to Temporarily Slash Tariffs
  • Global Stocks Jump After U.S. and China Cut Tariffs
  • China Courts Lula and Latin America After Trump’s Tariff Shock

item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

There once was a tariff so steep,
That factories began to creep,
To Vietnam they fled,
Leaving China in dread,
While Xi’s plans were costly to keep.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • US and China Meet for First Time Since Trump Imposed Tariffs
  • This Is the Trade Conflict Xi Jinping Has Been Waiting For
  • Chinese Factories Are Moving Manufacturing to Vietnam to Escape Trump’s Tariffs

item.title: Robots, Tariffs, and Tesla's Trials
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Robots, Tariffs, and Tesla’s Trials

In a trade war with robots and steel,
China’s gains make Trump’s tariffs seem surreal.
Japan’s caught in the mix,
While Musk’s rare earth fix,
Leaves Tesla’s profit drop a real ordeal.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • An Army of Robots Is China’s Weapon in Trump’s Tariff War
  • Trump’s Trade War With China Puts Japan in a Tight Spot
  • Elon Musk Warns China’s Rare Earth Restrictions May Delay Tesla Robots
  • Tesla Profits Drop 71% Amid Backlash to Elon Musk’s Role Under Trump

item.title: Trade Wars and Rare Earth Fears
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trade Wars and Rare Earth Fears

In China rare earths are on pause,
As Europe fears goods without cause.
Trump’s tariffs ignite,
Trade wars in sight,
Leaving world markets with jaws.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • China Halts Critical Rare Earth Exports as Trade War Intensifies
  • Why Europe Fears a Flood of Cheap Goods From China
  • The U.S.-China Trade War
